description: Network security and boundary protection. Firewalls, network segmentation, security groups, WAF, DDoS protection.

subcriteria.name: firewall_configuration
subcriteria.reference_text: Firewall rules and security group configurations restricting inbound and outbound traffic. Principle of least access applied to network rules.

subcriteria.name: network_segmentation
subcriteria.reference_text: Network segmentation separating production, staging, and development environments. VPCs, subnets, and network boundaries documented.

subcriteria.name: waf_protection
subcriteria.reference_text: Web Application Firewall configuration protecting web-facing services. Active rule sets blocking common attack patterns.

subcriteria.name: network_diagram
subcriteria.reference_text: Network architecture diagram showing VPCs, subnets, security groups, and trust boundaries between components.

mismatch_signals.reason: High-level product architecture without security detail does not demonstrate network boundary controls.
IP address list without firewall rule context is not sufficient network security evidence.
